message:
fix: Correctness and robustness fixes from file-by-file review

- build-variant.ts: Add config_wizer.o and pymode_wizer.o to skip list
  to prevent linker conflicts when wizer build artifacts exist
- build-extension.ts: Use warn() instead of error() on link failure so
  cleanup runs and caller gets false return value
- cli/zigpy.ts: Fix wrong WASM path (build/python.wasm -> build/zig-wasi/),
  use statSync instead of readFileSync for file size (avoids 5.7MB reads)
- generate-stdlib-fs.ts: Use fileURLToPath() instead of URL.pathname
  for correct path resolution with spaces/special chars
- build-phase2.ts: Fix zig-cc wrapper -z flag handling — use SKIP_NEXT
  to properly skip the argument following -z
- bundle-project.ts: Constrain TOML parsing to section boundaries to
  prevent cross-section regex matches
- pymode-install.ts: Filter platform-specific dependency markers
  (sys_platform, platform_system, os_name) that don't apply to WASI
- build-recipe.ts: Use /\.c$/ regex instead of .replace(".c","") to
  avoid corrupting filenames containing ".c" (e.g., foo.config.c)
- build-stdlib.ts: Fix misleading error message about cpython submodule
- Add ZIP >65535 entry guards to all three ZIP writers
